calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-13-2017 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar May-09-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Caroline Hinshaw appeared by telephone for Jayne Hoxie (Administrator).

Ms. Hinshaw stated that she will file a copy of the bank statement showing the deposit of the proceeds from the sale of the vehicle and that transferring title of the vehicle was a maneuver to get the car sold rather that having it remain here where it had been vandalized. Ms. Hinshaw also addressed the issue of payment of the Spouse's travel expenses stating that the Administrator had sustained an injury, that there were strange circumstances, that there was an issue with another party taking the Decedent's personal belongings with him to San Jose, that they needed to get everything out of the premises and that the Spouse helped with that. The Court informed Counsel that it is not inclined to pay fees for acquisition of the tax identification number. The Petition for Final Distribution, etc. is taken under submission.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-09-2016 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Feb-17-2016 Continued To Mar-09-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

EX PARTE PETITION FOR LETTERS OF SPECIAL ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-28-2016 Granted Per Written Order
